info.title: Augmont Gold EMI
info.description:
Augmont Gold EMI APIs for merchant.
https://gold-loan-uat-new-org.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/swagger.json

**Description:**

**API Authorization:**
For authentication send two parameters in header 1) authorization and 2) api tag.

**To Generate Authorization Token:**

Step:1 Go to [jwt.io](https://jwt.io) to generate token

Step:2 To create jwt token, Augmont provide api-key and broker unique Id. Paste api-key in signature part of jwt.io and broker Id in payload
Example of payload and sinature: { "brokerId": "KPPERTY" } and "WEDFA-GTHJD-CVGDJF-DBNNM"

Step:3 Copy encrypted token.

Step:4 Click on "Authorize" on the current page.

Step:5 Paste the encrypted token and api-tag in Authorize pop up.

**For Authorization:** Paste encrypted token in Authorization text box
**For api-tag:** Pass static "merchantLogin" in api-tag which is second option in headers.

**Example of Headers:**
Authorization : jwt eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJicmtvZXJJZCI6IktSNFI4V1ZLIn0.CHmo-Ab8xKDxwDR8obRxoVkQe09GJ6fhR4Uh7EJVFjA
api-tag : merchantLogin

post.summary: To place order (step 5 to place order).

schema.description: customerId, blockId, paymentMode and depositDate are mandatory. Remaining fields are depends on paymentMode.

customerId.description: Use customerId from checkout cart API. This field is required for all paymentMode.

blockId.description: Use blockId from checkout cart API. This field is required for all paymentMode.

transactionId.description: Enter generated transactionId. This field is required for all paymentMode - imps,neft,rtgs,cheque.

transactionDetails.description: Enter transactionDetails in case of paymentMode - paymentGateway

transactionUniqueId.description: Use transactionUniqueId from verify OTP API in case of paymentMode -imps,neft,rtgs,cheque.

paymentMode.description: Select paymentMode as paymentGateway or imps or neft or rtgs or cheque or cash or agentWallet

bankName.description: This field is required for paymentMode - imps,neft,rtgs,cheque

bankBranch.description: This field is required for paymentMode - imps,neft,rtgs,cheque

chequeNumber.description: This field is required for paymentMode - Cheque

depositDate.description: Use YYYY-MM-DD format for deposit date. This field is required for all paymentMode.

schema.description: This api is to place order

This status code can show multiple error messages. These are -
transactionDetails are required.
Insufficient wallet balance.
payment verification failed.
bankName is required
bankBranch is required
blockId is not verified

post.summary: Send OTP to place order (step 3.2 to place order).

stateName.description: Use state Name from State API.

isAppliedForKyc.description: true if customer is applying for KYC for 1st time.

panCardFileId.description: Use file-upload api to upload PAN card file and use Id from there.

blockId.description: Use block Id from checkout cart API.

shippingStateName.description: Use state Name from State API.

post.summary: verify OTP to place order (step 4 to place order). (select paymentMode as paymentGateway or imps or neft or rtgs or cheque or agentWallet)

customerId.description: Use customerId from get customer(step 3.1) api

otp.description: Use sent otp on your number

paymentMode.description: Select paymentMode as paymentGateway or imps or neft or rtgs or cheque or agentWallet

post.description: This API is provided to merchant to create order without adding products into a cart, bypass address verification and payment gateway or any payment method.

productId.description: Use product get api to get product Id

paymentTypeId.description: paymentTypeId = 1 (for 3 months EMI),paymentTypeId = 2 (for 6 months EMI),paymentTypeId = 3 (for 9 months EMI) paymentTypeId = 4 (for Spot Orders)

stateName.description: Use city and state get apis for stateName.

cityName.description: Use city and state get apis for cityName. Only mentioned city in response should be selected.

transactionId.description: Merchant should add generated transaction Id on their system for transactionId.

shippingStateName.description: Use city and state get apis for shippingStateName.

shippingCityName.description: Use city and state get apis for shippingCityName. Only mentioned city in response should be selected.
